'''Cair Tok Noimm''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who served circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. She was a member of the [[New Republic Security Council]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' indicates that Cair Tok Noimm was a male.
